MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-13-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT NAEEMAH MARIE HUNT'S MOTION TO STRIKE PRAYER FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES IN PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - Defendant's motion to strike the punitive damages claim is granted with leave to amend. Plaintiff must plead facts to support this claim. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
